mapper.sql: select p.id, p.project_code, p.project_name, p.engineering_project, p.project_category_id, p.client_unit, p.contact_name, p.contact_phone, p.project_location, p.contract_id, p.status, p.extra_data::text as extra_data, p.del_flag, p.create_by, p.create_time, p.update_by, p.update_time, p.remark from proj_project p
mapper.select:
select p.id, p.project_code, p.project_name, p.engineering_project, p.project_category_id, p.client_unit, p.contact_name, p.contact_phone, p.project_location, p.contract_id, p.status, p.extra_data::text as extra_data, p.del_flag, p.create_by, p.create_time, p.update_by, p.update_time, p.remark, c.name as category_name, ct.contract_name, coalesce(ln.leader_names, '') as leader_names, ta.assign_date, ta.duration_require, ta.total_duration from proj_project p left join proj_category c on c.id = p.project_category_id left join proj_contract ct on ct.id = p.contract_id left join lateral ( select string_agg(u.user_name, ', ' order by l.id) as leader_names from proj_leader l inner join sys_user u on u.user_id = l.user_id where l.project_id = p.id and l.del_flag = '0' ) ln on true left join lateral ( select min(t.assign_date) as assign_date, (max(t.required_finish_date) - min(t.assign_date)) as duration_require, (max(t.actual_finish_date) - min(t.assign_date)) as total_duration from proj_task t where t.project_id = p.id and t.del_flag = '0' ) ta on true where p.del_flag = '0'
AND p.project_code like concat('%', #{projectCode}, '%')
AND p.project_name like concat('%', #{projectName}, '%')
AND p.engineering_project like concat('%', #{engineeringProject}, '%')
AND p.project_category_id = #{projectCategoryId}
AND p.client_unit like concat('%', #{clientUnit}, '%')
AND p.contract_id = #{contractId}
AND p.status = #{status}
AND p.create_time >= to_timestamp(#{params.beginTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND p.create_time <= to_timestamp(#{params.endTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
order by p.create_time desc

select p.id, p.project_code, p.project_name, p.engineering_project, p.project_category_id, p.client_unit, p.contact_name, p.contact_phone, p.project_location, p.contract_id, p.status, p.extra_data::text as extra_data, p.del_flag, p.create_by, p.create_time, p.update_by, p.update_time, p.remark, c.name as category_name, ct.contract_name, coalesce(ln.leader_names, '') as leader_names, ta.assign_date, ta.duration_require, ta.total_duration from proj_project p left join proj_category c on c.id = p.project_category_id left join proj_contract ct on ct.id = p.contract_id left join lateral ( select string_agg(u.user_name, ', ' order by l.id) as leader_names from proj_leader l inner join sys_user u on u.user_id = l.user_id where l.project_id = p.id and l.del_flag = '0' ) ln on true left join lateral ( select min(t.assign_date) as assign_date, (max(t.required_finish_date) - min(t.assign_date)) as duration_require, (max(t.actual_finish_date) - min(t.assign_date)) as total_duration from proj_task t where t.project_id = p.id and t.del_flag = '0' ) ta on true where p.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into proj_project( project_code, project_name, engineering_project, project_category_id, client_unit, contact_name, contact_phone, project_location, contract_id, status, extra_data, remark, create_by, create_time )values( #{projectCode}, #{projectName}, #{engineeringProject}, #{projectCategoryId}, #{clientUnit}, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{projectLocation}, #{contractId}, #{status}, #{extraData}::jsonb, #{remark}, #{createBy}, now() )
mapper.delete: update proj_project set del_flag = '2' where id = #{id}

update proj_project set del_flag = '2' where id in
#{id}
mapper.update: update proj_project set status = '已办结', update_time = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select p.id as project_id, p.project_code as project_code, p.project_name as project_name, p.engineering_project, p.client_unit, c.name as category_name, cp.price as contract_price from proj_project p left join proj_category c on c.id = p.project_category_id and c.del_flag = '0' left join proj_contract_price cp on cp.contract_id = p.contract_id and cp.category_id = p.project_category_id and cp.del_flag = '0' where p.contract_id = #{contractId} and p.del_flag = '0' order by p.create_time
